prompt_language: English generation prompts with Chinese review notes

visual_strategy.continuity_strategy: reuse character consistency prompts and adjacent-shot transition requirements

shot_prompts.scene_summary: 落日海滩：女孩沿着潮线缓慢向前走。
shot_prompts.start_keyframe_prompt: cinematic realistic film still, wide shot, slow tracking, 落日海滩, 女孩位于画面右侧三分线，远处海平线与落日占据背景。, the same young woman in her early 20s with long black hair and a light summer dress, warm sunset beach lighting, 安静、轻微低落, vertical 9:16 composition
shot_prompts.end_keyframe_prompt: cinematic realistic continuation of S001, 女孩沿着潮线缓慢向前走。, same young woman with identical face, long black hair and light summer dress, same sunset beach environment, emotionally restrained 安静、轻微低落, warm golden hour light
shot_prompts.motion_prompt: 女孩沿着潮线缓慢向前走。; gentle natural motion, slow cinematic pacing, stable camera, subtle sea breeze, preserve character identity and clothing, keep the sunset direction consistent
shot_prompts.lighting_prompt: warm golden sunset light, soft rim light, natural beach reflections, low contrast cinematic shadows
shot_prompts.style_prompt: realistic cinematic healing short film, low saturation warm color grade, natural skin texture, restrained emotion
shot_prompts.consistency_prompt: CHAR_001: a young woman in her early 20s, long black hair, light summer dress, soft melancholic expression, consistent face and clothing, walking alone on a sunset beach
shot_prompts.negative_prompt: low resolution, watermark, logo, subtitles, text artifacts, duplicate person, extra limbs, deformed hands, distorted face, inconsistent clothing, changed hairstyle, unrealistic skin, flicker, warped background
shot_prompts.image_generation_notes: Generate start/end keyframes for S001; preserve composition and emotional intent from storyboard.
shot_prompts.video_generation_notes: Generate a 5-second I2V clip; prioritize stable character identity, slow movement, and scene continuity.

transition_prompts.transition_motion_prompt: Transition from S001 to S002 using match cut to medium shot, preserving the same girl, same beach location, sunset direction, clothing, hair movement, and emotional progression.
